methodsAttempted.query: Altai State University official domain and QS 2026 row metadata
methodsAttempted.notes: Confirmed Altai State University rowNumber 704, rank 851-900, Barnaul, Russia from the local QS 2026 ranking file. Ranking metadata was used only for crawl planning.

methodsAttempted.query: site:asu.ru (искусственный интеллект OR нейросет OR ChatGPT OR generative AI OR генеративный) (положение OR регламент OR политика OR рекомендации OR методические OR обучение OR студенты OR преподаватели) Алтайский государственный университет
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned official ASU news/advisory pages about AI assistants for teachers and students, a library notice, and AI academic program/project pages.

methodsAttempted.query: site:asu.ru (положение OR регламент OR приказ OR методические рекомендации) (искусственный интеллект OR нейросети OR ChatGPT OR генератив) АлтГУ
methodsAttempted.notes: A second official-domain search did not locate a formal university-wide AI policy. It surfaced an official library notice that timed out during fetch and official news/program pages that were lower specificity.

methodsAttempted.query: АлтГУ интеллектуальные помощники студенты преподаватели ASUProctor AI навигатор
methodsAttempted.notes: Follow-up review prioritized two official Управление цифровизации образовательных траекторий pages with body text describing AI assistants, platform access, instructions, and support contacts.

artifacts.summary: Official Altai State University sources found AI-related official news/advisory evidence for available teacher and student AI assistants, including AI course/test generators, AI-supported proctoring, and a student career navigator. No formal university-wide generative-AI conduct policy was found in the accessible official sources reviewed.

artifacts.title: Altai State University AI assistant source review
artifacts.summary: Official ASU advisory/news sources describe AI assistants available to teachers and students, including course/test generation, AI-supported proctoring reports, and a student career navigator. The accessible sources reviewed did not establish a formal university-wide generative-AI conduct policy.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Direct HTTP and Firecrawl scraping timed out for one official library notice; it was not used as claim evidence.
Claims are based on official news/advisory text and should not be read as formal university-wide AI policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
